verdict.summary: Embedding dimensions do not match between query and stored vectors.

dead_ends.action: Truncate or pad vectors to match dimensions
dead_ends.why_fails: Destroys semantic meaning of the embedding.

dead_ends.action: Average multiple embeddings to reduce dimension
dead_ends.why_fails: Averaging across dimensions loses directional information.

workarounds.action: Ensure same embedding model is used for indexing and querying
workarounds.how: Store model name alongside vectors; reindex if model changes

workarounds.action: Re-embed all documents when switching embedding models
workarounds.how: Create new vector index with new model; migrate in batch
